title: cremanthodium lineare var. roseum
intro: Cremanthodium lineare var. roseum, also known as the Tibetan daisy or pink alpine daisy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cremanthodium lineare var. roseum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the flowers or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
